IndexPage.title: incremental.icu
IndexPage.hello: Keep Your Data In Sync Across All Platforms.
IndexPage.description: Keep Garmin (Global & China) and Coros data platforms in sync.
IndexPage.card1Desc: Sync your data in a single tap—easy and fast!
IndexPage.card2Desc: Your records stay fresh, even when you take a break.
IndexPage.card3Desc: No cost, try it for free! You might even get lucky.
IndexPage.card4Desc: Please give me a ⭐, pretty please!

LoginPage.codeSent: Verification code sent to your email
LoginPage.errorSendCode: Failed to send verification code, please try again later
LoginPage.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
LoginPage.registerSubtitle: Join us and start your journey

DashPage.oneclickSyncDesc: Connect two or more platforms, click one-click sync, and automatically upload the latest 10 pieces of sports data, filtering out duplicate records with the same time and distance.
DashPage.selectSourceAndTarget: Please select a source and target platform first
DashPage.syncFailedTryAgain: Sync request failed, please try again later
DashPage.refreshFailedTryAgain: Refresh request failed, please try again later
DashPage.refreshNotSupported: This platform does not support refreshing authentication
DashPage.manageSync: Manage your cross-platform sports data synchronization
DashPage.dataSyncDesc: Select the source and destination platforms, then sync your latest 10 activities with one click.
DashPage.dataSecuritySummary: To sync your sports data, this tool needs to log in and store your account credentials on the server. We encrypt and store your credentials following industry standards to protect your information. By continuing to use this tool, you acknowledge that you have read and agree to our
DashPage.dataSecurityDetail1: Please be aware of and agree to the following:
DashPage.dataSecurityDetail2: Related services depend on third parties. We strive to ensure availability but do not guarantee continuous access.
DashPage.dataSecurityDetail3: Due to brand login mechanisms, please do not log in to your account on other devices while using this tool, to avoid invalidating authorization credentials.
DashPage.dataSecurityDetail4: We encrypt and store your information strictly, but cannot completely eliminate potential uncertainties in the network environment. Continued use means you fully understand the above and authorize us to sync and manage your data.
